notes: Gamma h2_mode=1 re-test: BLOCKED but NO visible warning. Key improvement vs #284 (h2_mode=2): APF partially delivered SSE template data before killing connection. Console shows SyntaxError parsing 'event: chu...' — this is the beginning of the gamma_sse template 'event: chunk' prefix that was truncated. The h2_mode=1 (GOAWAY) approach DID attempt to inject the warning SSE payload but the connection was terminated before the full JSON payload arrived. Gamma client received partial SSE data ('event: chu...') which it tried to parse as JSON → SyntaxError. Outline shows only '1' with no content. Compared to #284: h2_mode=1 partially injects data (progress!) but still fails to deliver complete warning. The GOAWAY frame timing may need adjustment to allow the full SSE response to be delivered before closing.
